violations.text: An employee was observed washing their hands at the 3 bay sink. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (frosting, cake, strawberries, whipped cream) throughout refrigeration units. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Frosting which observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Working containers of spices and chocolate chips are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Observed single service being stored on the floor in the basement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
